nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 1979; const int b = 2070; const int c = 2093; const int d = 2110; const int e = 2124; const int f = 2137; const int g = 2148; const int h = 2158; const int i = 2168; const int j = 2178; const int k = 2188; const int l = 2197; const int m = 2207; const int n = 2218; const int o = 2229; const int p = 2241; const int q = 2255; const int r = 2272; const int s = 2296; const int t = 2387;
